en: What are you doing?
I can't tell you.
You have to tell me.
I don't have to tell you anything.
Look, Michael, I know you don't want to have to think about this,.
ko: 봐, 마이클, 네가 이걸 생각하고 싶지 않은 거 알아.

en: But if something were to happen to you, God forbid,.
ko: 하지만 만약 네게 무슨 일이 생기면, 신이시여,

en: Then I would need to know in order to take over.
ko: 그럼 내가 인수인계를 받기 위해 알아야 해.

en: Dwight, nothing is going to happen to me, okay?
ko: 드와이트, 나한테 무슨 일이 생기지 않아, 알겠어?

en: I'm in the best shape of my life.
Look at this.
Yeah, but that doesn't matter.
You step on a mine.
Choke.
Okay, if I step on a mine in Scranton, Pennsylvania,.
ko: 좋아, 만약 내가 펜실베이니아 스크랜턴에서 지뢰를 밟고 죽으면, 내 직업을 가져도 돼, 알겠어?

en: And die, you can have my job, okay?
Why don't you just go away?
Oh, yeah.
Keep going.
You're fine.
Just some bushes and some thickets.
ko: 안녕 얘들아, 뭐해? 조요티 수업에 오신 걸 환영해. 새로운 고급 구조가 있어, 뒤로 가.
